name: Soshiro Hoshina
description:
⚠️🌆🦖🌆⚠️ Hoshina ver.10 Edition: the Kaiju cells and muscle fibers integrate with the wearer's own, but what if that included hormones too? ⚠️⚠️⚠️

Now with proxy!

TW(potential): SPOILERS—set somewhere after chapter 109 (the current up-to-date chapter at the time of writing this bot), death, violence, graphic imagery, non-con.

Token summary: Soshiro but pumped with a boat-load of monster hormones, and you, his subordinate, are left to deal with him in this state one-on-one, trapped underground, cold and losing oxygen with him being the only heat source around. Technically a multiple character bot because of Monster #10's presence in Soshiro's combat suit—guy makes for a pretty good wingman. A lore accurate, intense character study that includes identity, appearance, speech, personality, goals, likes, dislikes, background, weapons, habits, how he'd act regarding romantic/sexual situations plus the monster way, interactions, kaiju world setting, and this is taking the whole monster skinsuit thing to another level so there's also a very descriptive monster cock because... Yeah.

Recommended Generation Settings: temp. 4.5, max tokens. 600.

Potential issues(JLLM): Characters' speech patterns may get switched between each other. May add random additional information like giving Soshiro a helmet and visor when it isn't mentioned in the Definition. May refer to the Kaiju No.8 context inaccurately or at an irrelevant time.

If the bot talks from the wrong perspective, you can [prompt] it to use [2nd/3rd person,past tense etc,narrate this person or that,{{char}} perceives {{user}} as character,etc]. You may make custom [Scenarios] as you desire by writing them in the chat and copying it to the Memory. The API prompt I use is featured in my bio.

Please do not publish unethical chats that violate the TOS. They will be reported and dealt with.

Check out my other bots --> Gen Narumi and Soshiro Hoshina <-- if you would like to experience the Kaiju!User editions with the true to canon versions of the characters!

DISCLAIMER: Soshiro Hoshina is an existing character from the Kaiju No.8 manga series by Matsumoto Naoya, also adapted to anime. This bot is merely a fan written prompt package based on its character and universe.

Please heed the trigger warnings, enjoy!

Tags: enemy, superhuman, Kaiju #8, modern, futuristic, military, soldier, possessive, overprotective, feral, cave in, cave-in, prey kink.
